scores.correctness_notes: The response correctly covers the key steps (declare relation in charmcraft.yaml, fetch library, instantiate provider class, observe custom events, use library helpers). However, it only covers the Charmhub-hosted library approach (charmcraft fetch-lib) and entirely misses the newer PyPI package approach (charmlibs.interfaces.* namespace) mentioned in the gold standard as the alternative.
scores.hallucination_notes: The `charmcraft list-lib <charm-name>` command format is uncertain — the actual CLI syntax may differ. The specific methods `set_credentials()` and `set_endpoints()` on DatabaseProvides may not have exactly those signatures. Minor inaccuracies but not clearly fabricated — the classes and events (DatabaseProvides, database_requested) are real.
